items.title: Sector Update: Financial Stocks Decline Late Afternoon
items.description: Financial stocks fell in late Tuesday afternoon trading with the NYSE Financial Index dropping 0.4%

items.title: Mark Hanson, Black Buffalo Co-Founder and President, honored by Goldman Sachs as one of the Most Exceptional Entrepreneurs at the 2025 Builders and Innovators Summit
items.description: Goldman Sachs (NYSE: GS) has recognized Mark Hanson, Co-Founder and President of Black Buffalo Inc., as one of the Most Exceptional Entrepreneurs of 2025 at its Builders and Innovators Summit in Healdsburg, California.

items.title: Wall Street Says the Yen's Comeback Could Be Just Beginning
items.description: Goldman Sachs sees a slow but powerful turn ahead for Japan's currency as ultra-easy policy fades

Goldman Sachs in talks with Kuwait Investment Authority for $10bn – report
items.description: The mandate is aimed at strengthening Goldman Sachs’ private markets strategy in the Middle East.
